primary.relevance: Direct — round table found for free, ultimate bargain furniture
Location match — free find in Valencia neighborhoods
Core topic — rescuing discarded furniture from the street
Exact item match — recycled round table
Content pillar — cycling POV discovery method

thematic_elements: Street discovery — the thrill of spotting something useful abandoned on the sidewalk
Price shock — contrasting the mesa redonda's retail value with its free street price
Cycling as exploration tool — the bike lets you see what cars miss
Benimaclet and Trinitat neighborhood character — residential, lived-in, real
Everyday sustainability — rescuing furniture that still has life in it
suggested_natural_phrases: Iba pedaleando por Benimaclet y mira lo que me encontré
Una mesa redonda tirada en la calle — ¿cuánto crees que cuesta nueva?
Esto en tienda te sale mínimo...
La bici te lleva a encontrar cosas que ni imaginas
Gratis. En la calle. Perfectamente utilizable.
givore_mention_guideline: 20% casual — mention once briefly if natural, e.g., 'con Givore alguien se la habría llevado antes'
